name: NATIONAL RESEARCH CORP
summary: NRC Health (National Research Corporation) provides subscription-based healthcare experience management solutions to healthcare organizations across the United States. Founded in 1981, the company offers AI-enabled products across four solution categories: Patient Experience, Consumer Experience, Employee Experience, and Market Experience. Its platform collects, analyzes, and delivers feedback from patients, consumers, and clinicians to help healthcare systems improve operations, compliance, and patient loyalty.

products.name: Market Insights
products.description: Largest U.S. healthcare consumer database measuring opinions and behaviors of approximately 300,000 healthcare consumers annually via syndicated survey.

products.name: Patient Experience Solutions
products.description: Cross-continuum multi-mode digital platform collecting and measuring patient experience data, including CAHPS-compliant surveys and discharge call workflows.

products.name: Employee Experience Solutions
products.description: Combines engagement, pulse, lifecycle, Culture of Safety, and Magnet RN Satisfaction surveys with employee rounding tools and unified dashboards.

products.name: Consumer Experience Solutions
products.description: Helps healthcare organizations build patient loyalty and manage online reputation, including verified star ratings derived from patient survey data.

products.name: Online Reputation Solutions
products.description: Enables healthcare organizations to publish verified reviews and manage clinician profiles to support consumer decision-making.

products.name: Market Experience Solutions
products.description: Subscription-based services for tracking brand awareness, perception, competitive differentiators, and community segmentation in healthcare markets.
